answers: Monitoring = tracking system health and performance. CPU, memory, disk, network, and application metrics in real-time.
Tools: Prometheus + Grafana (open source), Datadog (SaaS), New Relic (APM), CloudWatch (AWS), Zabbix (infrastructure).
Key metrics: uptime, response time, error rate, CPU/memory usage, and throughput. Set alerts for anomalies.
Monitoring tip: monitor from user perspective (synthetic checks) + server-side metrics. Dashboard should answer 'is everything okay?' at a glance.
